ham.subject: Your Weekly Deals & Updates – 2026-04-15
ham.body:
Hello Valued Subscriber,

Thank you for being part of our community. This week, we’re excited to share exclusive offers on our top-selling products, special discounts for loyal customers, and a sneak peek at upcoming releases.

- **Limited-Time Offer**: Get 25% off on all accessories when you use code WEEKLY25.
- **New Arrivals**: Check out the latest gadgets that are already flying off the shelves.
- **Member Spotlight**: Read how one of our customers transformed their workflow with our solutions.

To take advantage of these deals, simply click the link below:
<URL>

We appreciate your continued support and look forward to serving you.

Best regards,
Marketing Team

spam.subject: Action Required: Immediate Password Reset for Your Microsoft 365 Account
spam.body:
Dear Microsoft 365 User,

Microsoft Security Team has identified suspicious authentication attempts on your account. This activity could compromise your sensitive data.

**Urgent Action Needed:** Reset your password within the next 24 hours to prevent automatic account lockout.

Please click the link below to reset your password:
<URL>

Failure to comply will result in your account being disabled, and accessing corporate resources will no longer be possible.

If you did not initiate this request, please let us know immediately by replying to this email.

Regards,
Microsoft Security Team
